name: double-cert-system
description: 学生校内双证管理系统

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start:demo: concurrently -n 后端,前端 -c yellow,cyan "cd backend && npm run demo" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.start:full: concurrently -n 后端,前端 -c yellow,cyan "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm start"
